category_sources: source_facts.description says High performance, scalable, Java virtual machine; official Eclipse OpenJ9 docs describe OpenJ9 as a JVM implementation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the Eclipse OpenJ9 project page; official Eclipse docs use the name Eclipse OpenJ9.
docs_sources: Official Eclipse OpenJ9 user documentation is hosted at eclipse.dev/openj9/docs and linked from the official project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/eclipse-openj9/openj9, so repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies it as a Java virtual machine; official docs state OpenJ9 is a VM in an OpenJDK runtime.
